item.dc:creator: Ryan J. Reilly
item.description: Federal prosecutor in seashells case against FBI Director James Comey has resigned.

media:content.media:text: A federal grand jury has returned an indictment charging former FBI Director James Comey over an Instagram photo he posted of seashells spelling out a message about President Donald Trump last year.
media:content.media:description: A federal grand jury has returned an indictment charging former FBI Director James Comey over an Instagram photo he posted of seashells spelling out "86 47" last year.

item.title: Lead federal prosecutor in James Comey seashells photo case steps aside

item.description: A federal judge temporarily blocked President Trump from officially renaming the Kennedy Center. U.S. District Judge Christopher Cooper found the board did not have the authority to rename the facility on its own.

media:content.media:title: Federal judge blocks Trump from officially renaming Kennedy Center
media:content.media:description: A federal judge temporarily blocked President Trump from officially renaming the Kennedy Center. U.S. District Judge Christopher Cooper found the board did not have the authority to rename the facility on its own.

item.title: Federal judge blocks Trump from officially renaming Kennedy Center

item.description: A major setback for Blue Origin and potentially for NASA, after one of the company's New Glenn rockets exploded last night. No one was hurt. Blue Origin is set to play a key role in NASA's push to go back to the moon, but now that launch schedule is in question. NBC's Tom Costello reports.

media:content.media:title: Blue Origin rocket explosion could delay NASA's moon plans
media:content.media:description: A major setback for Blue Origin and potentially for NASA, after one of the company's New Glenn rockets exploded last night. No one was hurt. Blue Origin is set to play a key role in NASA's push to go back to the moon, but now that launch schedule is in question. NBC's Tom Costello reports.

item.title: Blue Origin rocket explosion could delay NASA's moon plans

item.dc:creator: Julia Ainsley
Laura Strickler
item.description: WASHINGTON — The Trump administration is looking into selling some of the large warehouses that Immigration and Customs Enforcement had purchased earlier this year to serve as mega-detention centers for immigrants, according to two Department of Homeland Security officials

media:content.media:text: ICE Purchases Warehouse In Salt Lake City To Possibly Use As Detention Center
media:content.media:description: An aerial view of a warehouse purchased by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement in Salt Lake City, photographed on April 9.

item.title: ICE eyes selling mega-warehouses purchased for mass detention

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
Gary Grumbach
item.description: Learn more about how the America250 and Freedom 250 events differ as artists, including Martina McBride, Young MC and The Commodores, back out of Trump concert.

media:content.media:text: The special commemorative 250th anniversary American Flag.
media:content.media:description: America250 and Freedom 250 aren't connected, but each entity says they share similar goals of putting on nonpartisan events to honor the United States’ history on its milestone birthday.

item.title: One birthday, two party planners: Freedom 250 vs. America250, explained

item.dc:creator: Jane Weaver
Jiachuan Wu
Javier Zarracina
item.description: Learn more about the deadly 2026 Ebola outbreak, including how many cases there are so far, which countries are most affected, how this outbreak compares with others in severity and more.

media:content.media:text: Red Cross workers carry a coffin containing the body of Dr. Tibenderana Katho Blaise, who worked at the Centre Medical Evangelique and died of Ebola virus, in Bunia, Democratic Republic of the Congo, on Tuesday.
media:content.media:description: Red Cross workers carry a coffin containing the body of Dr. Tibenderana Katho Blaise, who worked at the Centre Medical Evangelique and died of Ebola virus, in Bunia, Democratic Republic of the Congo, on Tuesday.

media:content.media:text: Red Cross workers carry a coffin containing the body of Dr. Tibenderana Katho Blaise, who worked at the Centre Medical Evangelique and died of Ebola virus, in Bunia, Democratic Republic of the Congo, on Tuesday.
media:content.media:description: Red Cross workers carry a coffin containing the body of Dr. Tibenderana Katho Blaise, who worked at the Centre Medical Evangelique and died of Ebola virus, in Bunia, Democratic Republic of the Congo, on Tuesday.

media:content.media:text: Red Cross workers carry a coffin containing the body of Dr. Tibenderana Katho Blaise, who worked at the Centre Medical Evangelique and died of Ebola virus, in Bunia, Democratic Republic of the Congo, on Tuesday.
media:content.media:description: Red Cross workers carry a coffin containing the body of Dr. Tibenderana Katho Blaise, who worked at the Centre Medical Evangelique and died of Ebola virus, in Bunia, Democratic Republic of the Congo, on Tuesday.

item.title: Tracking the Ebola outbreak: Where the deadly virus is spreading

item.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

media:content.media:title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
media:content.media:description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

item.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio

item.dc:creator: Raquel Coronell Uribe
item.description: President Donald Trump is in “excellent health,” the White House physician said Friday in a memo the administration released after Trump’s visit to Walter Reed National Military Medical Center — his third in-person medical checkup in 13 months.“He is fully fit to carry out all duties of the Commander-in-Chief,” Dr.

media:content.media:text: President Donald Trump departs the White House on May 26, 2026, on his way to Walter Reed National Military Medical Center.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump departs the White House on May 26, 2026, on his way to Walter Reed National Military Medical Center.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Travels To And From Walter Reed National Military Medical Center For Presidential Physical
media:content.media:description: Trump leaves Walter Reed National Military Medical Center in Bethesda, Md., following his presidential physical Tuesday.

item.title: Trump in ‘excellent health’ after latest checkup, president’s physician says

item.dc:creator: Tim Stelloh
item.description: The video shows a shirtless, shoeless man meandering down a dirt driveway with a dog at his side.

media:content.media:text: A still showing Jake Baker on property in Kaimu, Hawaii.
media:content.media:description: A still showing Jake Baker on property in Kaimu, Hawaii.

item.title: Hawaii community feared triple-murder suspect would ‘show up at their house with a machete’

item.dc:creator: Julia Ainsley
Laura Strickler
item.description: WASHINGTON — The Trump administration is looking into selling some of the large warehouses that Immigration and Customs Enforcement had purchased earlier this year to serve as mega-detention centers for immigrants, according to two Department of Homeland Security officials

media:content.media:text: ICE Purchases Warehouse In Salt Lake City To Possibly Use As Detention Center
media:content.media:description: An aerial view of a warehouse purchased by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement in Salt Lake City, photographed on April 9.

item.title: ICE eyes selling mega-warehouses purchased for mass detention

item.dc:creator: The Politics Desk
item.description: Welcome to From the Politics Desk, a daily newsletter that brings you the NBC News Politics team’s latest reporting and analysis from the White House, Capitol Hill and the campaign trail

media:content.media:text: Louisiana Gov. Jeff Landry
media:content.media:description: Louisiana Gov. Jeff Landry in Atlanta, Ga., in January.

item.title: The latest redistricting move: From the Politics Desk

item.dc:creator: Ryan J. Reilly
item.description: Federal prosecutor in seashells case against FBI Director James Comey has resigned.

media:content.media:text: A federal grand jury has returned an indictment charging former FBI Director James Comey over an Instagram photo he posted of seashells spelling out a message about President Donald Trump last year.
media:content.media:description: A federal grand jury has returned an indictment charging former FBI Director James Comey over an Instagram photo he posted of seashells spelling out "86 47" last year.

item.title: Lead federal prosecutor in James Comey seashells photo case steps aside

item.dc:creator: Dan De Luce
Courtney Kube
Katherine Doyle
Gordon Lubold
item.description: The F-15 fighter that was shot down over southwestern Iran last month and set off a dangerous rescue mission was probably struck by a Chinese-made shoulder-launched missile, sources say.

media:content.media:text: US Military Aircraft Activity At RAF Base In England
media:content.media:description: An F15 fighter plane on Jan. 7 above Mildenhall, England.

item.title: Iran may have used Chinese missile to shoot down U.S. fighter jet, sources say

item.dc:creator: Jane Weaver
Jiachuan Wu
Javier Zarracina
item.description: Learn more about the deadly 2026 Ebola outbreak, including how many cases there are so far, which countries are most affected, how this outbreak compares with others in severity and more.

media:content.media:text: Red Cross workers carry a coffin containing the body of Dr. Tibenderana Katho Blaise, who worked at the Centre Medical Evangelique and died of Ebola virus, in Bunia, Democratic Republic of the Congo, on Tuesday.
media:content.media:description: Red Cross workers carry a coffin containing the body of Dr. Tibenderana Katho Blaise, who worked at the Centre Medical Evangelique and died of Ebola virus, in Bunia, Democratic Republic of the Congo, on Tuesday.

media:content.media:text: Red Cross workers carry a coffin containing the body of Dr. Tibenderana Katho Blaise, who worked at the Centre Medical Evangelique and died of Ebola virus, in Bunia, Democratic Republic of the Congo, on Tuesday.

item.dc:creator: Gordon Lubold
Gary Grumbach
Courtney Kube
item.description: WASHINGTON — The Defense Department is requiring members of the military to meet a certain body type criteria in order to attend the big Ultimate Fighting Championship event at the White House next month, according to two people familiar with the criteria and a Pentagon memo outlining the criteria that was reviewed by NBC News

media:content.media:text: President Trump's Ongoing Construction At The White House And Repainting Of The Reflecting Pool
media:content.media:description: Construction continued Tuesday for the upcoming June 14th UFC match on the South Lawn of the White House in Washington, D.C.

item.title: No heavyweights allowed: Troops must meet fitness criteria to attend White House UFC event

item.dc:creator: Daniella Silva
Laura Strickler
Julia Ainsley
Helen Graham
item.description: Democratic Gov. Mikie Sherill announced that the state would establish a protected peaceful protest zone outside Delaney Hall as she reiterated calls to shut down the facility.

media:content.media:text: Immigration Advocates Demonstrate And Clash With Officers Outside Delaney Hall Detention Facility In Newark
media:content.media:description: ICE agents use a chemical irritant as they clash with protestors outside of the federal immigration center at Delaney Hall, where ICE is housing detained immigrants, on May 28, 2026 in Newark, New Jersey.

item.title: N.J. establishes protected zone around ICE facility after several protesters are arrested during clashes

item.dc:creator: Denise Chow
item.description: The giant explosion during a test of a Blue Origin rocket is a problem both for Jeff Bezos’ space company and for NASA.

media:content.media:text: Image: Explosion of Blue Origin rocket at Cape Canaveral
media:content.media:description: Explosion of Blue Origin rocket at Cape Canaveral, FL

media:content.media:text: Image: Explosion of Blue Origin rocket at Cape Canaveral
media:content.media:description: The Blue Origin accident occurred during a static fire test, in which a rocket is fueled and its engines ignite, but the booster remains bolted to the launch pad and does not lift off.

item.title: Blue Origin’s rocket explosion is a big setback for NASA’s moon goals

item.dc:creator: Francie Ebert
item.description: A lounge chair sold on Amazon is being recalled after a report that an individual’s finger was amputated while adjusting the chair, officials said Thursday.

media:content.media:text: Recalled Giantex Lounge Chair, Model Number NP10025NY.
media:content.media:description: Recalled Giantex Lounge Chair, Model Number NP10025NY.

item.title: Lounge chair sold on Amazon recalled after person’s finger amputated

item.dc:creator: Gary Grumbach
Dareh Gregorian
item.description: Trump then appeared to wash his hands of the renovation and renaming efforts by announcing his administration would move to put Congress in control of the center.

media:content.media:text: The Kennedy Center in Washington, D.C.
media:content.media:description: The Kennedy Center in Washington, D.C.

item.title: Judge temporarily blocks Kennedy Center closure and orders removal of Trump’s name from building

item.dc:creator: Bianca Alvarez
item.description: Bar soaps work as effectively as body washes and I rounded up editor-approved picks from Dove, L’Occitane, Avène and more.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.
media:content.media:description: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.
media:content.media:description: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

item.title: Bar soaps vs. body wash — which is best for your skin?

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
Cory Fernandez
Bethany Heitman
item.description: I found the best methods and products for cleaning glasses, including reading glasses, sunglasses and more. Optometrists recommend the best cleaning products.

media:content.media:text: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.
media:content.media:description: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.

media:content.media:text: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.
media:content.media:description: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.

item.title: This is how you should actually be cleaning your glasses

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Sandals are notoriously not great for lots of walking. These podiatrists-approved sandals have built-in arch support and cushioning to keep you comfortable.

media:content.media:text: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.
media:content.media:description: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.

media:content.media:text: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.
media:content.media:description: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.

item.title: 6 podiatrist-approved sandals to comfortably walk in all summer

item.dc:creator: Michelle Rostamian
item.description: Our skin is continually aging, but those who are bothered by physical signs like fine lines, wrinkles and excessive dryness may want to consider adjusting their skin care routine, specifically when it comes to moisturizers.

media:content.media:text: Skin becomes drier as we age; that’s why adding moisture to the skin is key for those with mature skin.
media:content.media:description: Skin becomes drier as we age; that’s why adding moisture to the skin is key for those with mature skin.

media:content.media:text: Skin becomes drier as we age; that’s why adding moisture to the skin is key for those with mature skin.
media:content.media:description: Skin becomes drier as we age; that’s why adding moisture to the skin is key for those with mature skin.

item.title: Look for these ingredients in a moisturizer for mature skin

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
Corky Siemaszko
item.description: Teenagers behaving badly in groups is hardly a new thing, experts said. But social media has made it easier to rapidly mobilize this generation of teenagers, who may be craving social interaction and looking for an outlet after having spent their formative years isolated during the Covid pandemic.

media:content.media:text: A still from a video showing 'Teen takeovers' in Chicago on Memorial Day, on May 26, 2026.
media:content.media:description: A still from a video showing 'Teen takeovers' in Chicago on Memorial Day, on May 26, 2026.

item.title: Teen ‘takeovers’ push cities to take action as experts see echoes of the Covid pandemic
